review_notes: The functions correctly map to the NIST AU-11(1) control by addressing audit log retention and long-term storage capabilities within Kubernetes. The naming conventions are mostly followed, but minor improvements could enhance clarity and consistency.
naming_improvements: Consider using 'k8s_audit_log_retention_policy_set' for more clarity on the action being performed.
Ensure that 'k8s_audit_long_term_storage_enabled' clearly indicates the storage mechanism is persistent and accessible.
title: Audit Record Retention - Audit record retention | long - term retrieval capability employ [ assignment
step1_reasoning: The control AU-11(1) focuses on audit record retention and long-term retrieval capability. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logs have a defined retention policy and are stored in a manner that allows for long-term retrieval. This involves configuring the audit log retention policy and ensuring that audit logs are stored in a persistent and accessible storage solution.
